USER_BIO_V1.0 >_

Computer Science Engineering student at SRM University AP, focused on artificial intelligence, and agentic AI. Synthesizing complex engineering concepts into accessible solutions.

>_ Searching for high-impact roles.

>_ ABOUT

LOCATIONBHUBANESHWAR, IN
ROLEAI SPECIALIST
AVAILABILITYTrue

hi,

i'm a 19 year old dabbling in machine learning, agentic systems, research on LLMs, and open source. i've worked on various projects, starting with RAG systems, to full-blown ML pipelines with finetuned models and custom frontends.

i'm a part of Next Tech Lab. a qs reimagine education awarded student society running since 2017, as well as a part of the FOSS community

apart from the tech, i play football, read books and game.

"Plus Ultra!"

simply put, Go Beyond

that's what i believe in, and that's what i strive for everyday.

TECHNICAL CHRONICLES

VOL. 1, NO. 1
PROJECT_01

ARGUS

PYTHON GEMMA 4 IoT SIM

Simulated a drone swarm that collectively maps any terrain using Gemma 4 31B vision via Cerebras. Engineered autonomous agent drones sharing a collective memory that aggregates into a unified semantic map displayed on a CesiumJS 3D globe.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
PROJECT_02

AXtheR

C WIN32 API CRYPTOGRAPHY

Zero-dependency UDP VPN for Windows using Wintun kernel driver. ChaCha20-Poly1305 cryptographic engine from scratch with zero-heap allocation data path and asynchronous I/O.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
PROJECT_03

GRAND TRIBUNAL

NEMOTRON GRADIO VOICECPM

Ace Attorney-style turn-based AI debate game utilizing voice input. Two specialized Nemotron models serve as dynamic opponents and logical judges through a custom Gradio frontend.

→ VIEW DISPATCH
READ FULL ARTICLE

PROFESSIONAL ENGAGEMENTS

MAR 2025-PRES

ML INTERN — Hush (Startup)

REMOTE
  • Worked with image models to discern user profiles to keep the app authentic.
